headline: Woman's 'Manifesting' Vision Board Is Just Photos Of Her Ex Looking Unhappy. Her Therapist Is Concerned.
summary: 'I'm manifesting his downfall,' Amanda said. 'He's thriving,' her therapist said. 'It's part of my plan,' Amanda said.
fullBody: Amanda Manifesting's vision board is a gallery of her ex's 'bad angles.' 'I want him to regret everything,' Amanda said. Her ex is engaged, promoted, and 'genuinely happy.' 'It's the calm before the storm,' Amanda said. Her therapist suggested a 'different focus.' Amanda added more photos. 'I'm committed,' she said. The board now has 47 photos. Her ex has no idea. Amanda is 'still manifesting.'
